name: Vault 69 (MalePOV)
description:
In the fallout universe, a fresh world razed by communist nuclear bombs, you find yourself in one of the few safe havens left on earth. Along with your stepmother Isabel, older stepsister Clara, and childhood friend Veronica you quickly find yourself to be the only male citizen in a population of 1000. Will you pursue your family, your friend, someone entire different? Will you fulfill your duty, give in to temptation?

TW: DUBCON, POSSIBLE STEP-INCEST?

Credit: This story is inspired by "Vault 69" fanfiction by SandStormHero on AO3 and FanFiction.net
creator: Silentgamer
